research_contract.cannot_pass_with: technical feasibility evidence alone when product, user, customer, alternative, substitute, competitor, antagonist, or value uncertainty is still central
required_outputs: disconfirming evidence and reasons the app may not matter
facts, assumptions, and opinions separated clearly
research_contract.skill_trigger: Use primitive-market-research before Selection when product, user, customer, market, pricing, competitor, substitute, or antagonist uncertainty is material.
